label: stockholder
pattern: InstanceSchema; PART relation + re-anchored IS-MINE possession
gloss: A person who owns one or more shares of stock issued by a corporation, thereby holding an ownership interest in that corporation.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — the corporate, stock, and legal-financial character of the ownership relation is unavailable, so the AST renders a corporation as a thing, shares as its parts, and ownership as the person's re-anchored mine thought.
